title: Task outcome: task-20260711-004919734-Continue-the-approved-OS-com-c88cfd05-bd85-4c80-b2f2-dac75ba9f2a6
summary: Completed RAG-01 contextual hybrid retrieval contract. Added bounded contextual row metadata to Wiki/SQLite/dense indexes, independent semantic cosine top-K, exact alias and rare lexical priority, typed score contributions, retrieval lane budgets, private ChatGPT source exclusion, serialized hash-verified vector migrations with rollback/reapply, completion registry and Observatory status. Real vault passed 20/20 context eval, 12/12 RAG eval, 12/12 answer quality, live semantic retrieval, and verify:os. App f4a0e24 and data 1d173e0 were pushed to origin/main.
claim: Task outcome for DinoBrain: Completed RAG-01 contextual hybrid retrieval contract. Added bounded contextual row metadata to Wiki/SQLite/dense indexes, independent semantic cosine top-K, exact alias and rare lexical priority, typed score contributions, retrieval lane budgets, private ChatGPT source exclusion, serialized hash-verified vector migrations with rollback/reapply, completion registry and Observatory status. Real vault passed 20/20 context eval, 12/12 RAG eval, 12/12 answer quality, live semantic retrieval, and verify:os. App f4a0e24 and data 1d173e0 were pushed to origin/main.
decisions: Exclude 30_Sources/private from all default Wiki, SQLite, and Context Pack retrieval while preserving it as local-only source material.
Select dense candidates independently by cosine similarity with a bounded top-64 lane before RRF.
Keep explicit aliases and rare exact lexical terms stable through a dedicated rank signal and final bonus.
Expose typed sparse, BM25, dense, fallback, RRF, rerank, provenance, lifecycle, type-budget, recency, noise, and final contributions.
Limit supplemental non-behavior lanes to two for behavior-oriented packs and bound explicit operations intent to four records with canonical root README priority.
Require semantic_embedding_provider=true for hybrid_contextual_v2; local hashing and unlabelled vectors remain lexical_fallback_v2.
Serialize vector identity changes and persist hash-verified before/after artifacts with rollback and reapply.
next_steps: Implement RAG-03 external calibrated answer evaluation.
Implement RAG-04 declared 50k scale and latency evidence.
